concepts.name: Graph Representation
concepts.short_definition: Methods for storing graph data, such as adjacency lists or matrices.

concepts.name: Weighted Graph
concepts.short_definition: A graph where edges have associated numerical values.

concepts.name: Spanning Tree
concepts.short_definition: A subgraph that connects all vertices without forming cycles.

concepts.name: Minimum Spanning Tree
concepts.short_definition: A spanning tree with the minimum possible total edge weight.

concepts.name: Greedy Algorithm
concepts.short_definition: An algorithm that makes the locally optimal choice at each stage with the hope of finding a global optimum.

concepts.name: Priority Queue
concepts.short_definition: A data structure that stores elements with associated priorities and allows efficient retrieval of the element with the highest (or lowest) priority.

concepts.name: Prim's Algorithm
concepts.short_definition: A greedy algorithm for finding a minimum spanning tree for a weighted undirected graph.

concepts.name: Edge Relaxation
concepts.short_definition: The process of updating the estimated cost to reach a vertex if a shorter path is found.

concepts.name: Connected Components
concepts.short_definition: Subgraphs where any two vertices are connected to each other by paths, and which are connected to no additional vertices in the supergraph.

concepts.name: Graph Traversal
concepts.short_definition: Systematic way of visiting all vertices in a graph.
